commit_message:
[entropy_src/dv] Predict entropy drops [entropy_src/dv] Predict entropy drops This PR adapts the scoreboard to accurately predict entropy drops.
For  further information check out the individual commit messages.

I still need to do some clean up and there are still some failures I need to fix.
Most of this should be fairly straight forward:
- The observe FIFO contains words that should have been dropped.
- There is a mismatch for some markov watermark values.
- There is an assertion (AtRe
